mechanism: Because the size premium is actually a credit premium, and the value universe is populated by the same low-quality, high-leverage companies, both factors are trapped in the same structural position. Buying value or small-cap mechanically sells quality in the current regime.
regime_dependence: Active while HML-RMW correlation is -0.3 to -0.5 and Russell 2000 composition skews toward unprofitable, leveraged firms. Could break if rate cuts improve credit quality broadly.
